> Provide as few ways as possible—preferably one—of representing something.TRUTH!Or, expressed in YAML 1.1 [1]    y
    Y
    yes
    Yes
    YES
    true
    True
    TRUE
    on
    On
    ON

As expressed in YAML 1.2 [2]:    true

Or, as expressed in engineering practice:    "What version of YAML does our YAML parser adhere to?"
    "(shrug) who cares, let the tests find it"

[1]: https://yaml.org/type/bool.html[2]: https://yaml.org/spec/1.2.2/#10212-boolean
